text.title: my first time in france 🥖 a few days in paris, french food, eiffel tower, biking & lots of shopping
text.u: [Music]
[Laughter]
[Music]
Thank you.
[Music]
We have officially made it to Paris.
We're in the Airbnb now and it is so
cute. I have to show you guys a little
tour. This is what it looks like when
you first walk in. And this is the
kitchen. I think it is so cute. I love
that it is all out. I love the
industrial feel of everything. And
there's even a desk and like
workstation. I'm not going to do any
work this trip. Let me turn this on. So
now you guys can see what the view looks
like. And then this is what the bedroom
looks like. And there's even shades that
go up and down. So, I think that is so
cute and perfect for a good night's
sleep. This is the bathroom. It's also
super spacious. There's a washing
machine as well. And then a really nice
shower. And so, I'm going to be in here
for the next 4 days. But now, I'm
literally starving, so I'm going to get
ready and head out to a little beastro
for some dinner. I have not made any
reservations during this trip. I have
more of a bucket list planned for this
trip. So, things that I want to see and
do, but not necessarily all planned out
hour by hour. Yeah, let's get ready.
>> Okay, so Ainsy and I have just made it
out of the Airbnb. We got dressed really
quickly in matching brown and we've
walked approximately 200 m before
someone came up to us and asked to take
a picture of us. So, we said no
obviously because that's kind of odd and
I also don't really understand like what
they were asking for. It was a man
laughing too.
>> Yeah, it was a man also. He was on the
phone and it was so odd. I was like no.
And he was like really
>> a peace sign.
>> Yeah, he was like really take a photo.
But anyways,
[Music]
>> okay and I managed to get a table
without a reservation. We only had to
wait like 7 minutes, so honestly not bad
timing, but it is like 8:00 right now.
And we just ordered starters of
And then we got a steak freeze to share
dessert at home.
What happened?
[Music]
>> Okay, Angie and I wanted to get a little
bit of sweet and sour, so we got a Paris
breast. And the one that we had last
time was so so small. So, this is truly
the best thing ever.
>> That looks so good.
M.
>> Right. It's so good. This looks so good.
Look.
I've had this dream and this goal to
bike to the Eiffel Tower on my first day
in Paris to watch it sparkle, but it is
4 km away. So, we're going to city bike
it. I honestly haven't even city biked
in Toronto, so we're going to have to
see how it goes in Paris.
[Music]
We made it. We made it to the Eiffel
Tower. Barely following a route or a
map. We were kind of just going with the
flow of traffic. That was a little
chaotic. We had no idea where the lanes
were. We were like trying to follow
them, but yeah, we can't see.
>> Yeah. No, my contacts are also like not
the right prescription, but now the
Eiffel Tower is going to twinkle. So,
[Applause]
[Music]
>> hi guys. It is day two of Paris. I've
just gotten ready super quickly. I'm
wearing a matching set today. It's like
a corset and mini skirt. And we just
come to one of the oldest bakeries that
make croissants and it's called Soher as
recommended to us by our friend Vincent.
We're just going to get a classic
croissant and then probably a cappuccino
or espresso at a nearby cafe before
getting into the day. So, let's go
inside.
I decided to get a hot chocolate this
morning because not a very big coffee or
espresso person.
[Music]
Now, we've just come to Seson because
they were super kind and gave us a
little gift card. So, we're going to
pick out a few things and try on a few
of their new styles for fall.
Okay, this is the first cardigan that
I'm trying on. I think it is so cute. I
really love this color. I think I'm
going to be able to wear it with
multiple things. I like that the sleeves
are not too short and so I think I'm
going to go with this one. I'm going to
show you guys this other color and other
size, but I think it's too big. So, this
is the same cardigan in a different
color. And I think it just looked a
little too big for me, especially
because the arms are going to be tight.
So, I think it doesn't make sense for it
to be tight and then super duper loose.
I like this color, though.
[Music]
Hey guys, I just got in from Saison and
I've just had a little outfit change and
I feel like I usually stray away from
color in my wardrobe, but this trip
we're definitely changing that. And the
same goes for dressing up my phone. And
of course, that's all thanks to Caseify.
Every time I change my phone, the one
thing that I do is make sure that it's
wearing a Caseify case. And so with the
launch of the iPhone 17, that is no
exception. I can take this off and you
can see the print a little bit better. I
feel like it matches my outfit so
perfectly. I even have this other one
which is more fun and I think even
matches my lip shade perfectly. Casey
always just makes the most fun prints. I
have this Matcha made in heaven and it
is a glaze case and so it's super high
shine and of course all their cases are
Mag Safe because I always like to have
accessories on it. This is the snappy
snap and stick grip stand and so it
suctions onto smooth surfaces so you can
do a fit check or if you just want to
prop it up somewhere and then also just
pops out like this. And that's just how
you use it as the grip stand. But I
really just love how the cases are so
customizable. It can go with any of your
aesthetics. I just love that Caseify has
scratch resistant, strong, and
protective for your actual phone
products. There are so many different
prints to choose from and accessories.
They even have really cute phone straps
that are perfect just to have around
your hand. If you're kind of clumsy like
me and you like drop your phone often,
it's good to just have a little strap
around your wrist. Not to mention, it's
very cute and there are so many
different styles. And obviously, today I
picked up more cases from the Lou. The
store is so cute. They had so many
different options on the wall. There are
artwork inspired cases as well. So, if
you want to get 15% off at Caseify or
see the other Caseify aesthetics, then
you can go to my link in the description
box below or scan the QR code on screen.
We're headed over to the Lou right now.
I've heard from so many people that you
can spend days exploring the Lou. So,
we're allocating a big chunk of the
afternoon and I'm actually going to
break out the new shoes that I got in
Nice. I got these really cute ballerinas
and I think it just goes well with my
outfit right now. So, yeah, let's get
going.
[Music]
[Music]
[Music]
It is so incredibly busy here. Oh my
gosh.
So, we have made our way through all of
level one here. We started at Napoleon
III's apartment and then obviously saw
all of these antiques and then ended up
at the Mona Lisa, which was so packed.
And now we're on level zero just looking
at all of these different sculptures,
which is the room that I'm in right now.
Some of these sculptures are so insane.
But we're trying to make our way down to
minus one as well, just to see like
history of the Lou. We finished at the
lube and now we're headed to the six
arandis mall for a steaks dinner part
two because it includes two rounds of
steak and then unlimited fries.
[Music]
So that is where we were supposed to go
for dinner but the line literally is out
of frame. So, we are not going there
because I do not want to wait more than
like an hour and a half to have dinner
because it's already 7:00. So, we're
just going to pop in to another place
and then I do have a cafe spot that I
want to go to for dessert. So, that's
our plan for now. Also, I want to talk
about our bike ride. It was literally
supposed to take 10 minutes. It was 5
km. It's not even that far and it took
45. 10 minutes turned into 45. Well, to
be fair, there was rush hour and then we
got lost. I have never seen that many
bikers on the road unless it was for an
actual race. Like, this is insane. I'm
not even a biker. I don't know why I'm
biking during rush hour here.
[Music]
[Music]
[Music]
We are in Pen this morning. The bags are
so cute. You guys know I have been
wearing them for several years now. And
so I'm finally in one of the Paris
showrooms, but I'm torn between a few
styles. So I'm going to show you guys.
So, this is the first style that I
really love and I am really close to
getting just because I love a little
shoulder bag. But then I also really
love this style. It's a little bit
chunkier and I feel like can hold more
things. I just feel like the odds of me
wearing it are a little bit slimmer
because it's more of a handheld bag and
I am more of a shoulder girl bag. So,
I'm going to try both on and see what
works.
[Music]
I got my first matcha latte in Paris.
And of course, it is a strawberry one.
It also matches my top today.
[Music]
[Music]
Our breakfast spans two tables, but we
got a French breakfast, which is one hot
drink, orange juice, and I just chose
bread and butter. And then the English
breakfast was two eggs, and we chose an
omelette, bread, yogurt, and also a hot
drink and orange juice.
[Music]
I completely forget the building we were
just in, but I did a bunch of souvenir
shopping and I'm so excited to show you
guys a haul when I get home. But now
we're headed back just to drop off some
stuff because it's getting a little bit
heavy. And then we're going to explore
Le Mar.
[Music]
We got raspberry, pistachio, a Halloween
special, matcha, lemon, and tiramisu.
>> That's little strong matcha flavor.
[Music]
>> You with your heels,
your boots.
[Music]
[Music]
I will figure it out eventually.
[Music]
tower
[Music]
right now.
[Music]
Guys, I have just gotten in and I'm
already seated in this chair because I
have been in these tall boots since
10:30 a.m. It is now 12:30 a.m. That's
literally over 12 hours. These heels are
literally not a joke. They are at least
3 to 4 inches tall. They are so dirty
now. But I literally just need to take
these off with you because this is
insane. Oh my gosh, my feet are actually
so freaking dead. And you guys know I'm
literally a flat shoe girl, too. I don't
even know if my feet remember how to lay
flat. They've just been like this
literally all day. But yeah, now I'm
going to massage and raise my feet.
[Music]
